Notes: UWP takes 25-14 lead with 8:33 left in the first half...Making 13-of-15 shots
from the field and 3-of-4 free throws, UWO opens second half with a 34-11
scoring run to take a 64-45 lead with 6:49 left...UWO's Kitzke has a career-
high 25 points...UWO's first game in Albee Hall since Feb. 19, 2001 (vs. UWP).
Game.Officials: Nick LoCicero,  Tim Owens,  Mike Steidl
